Localization.Description: An action with a log filter can indicate an attempt to limit the data collected from the Aria Operations for Logs monitoring objects

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} added log filter "{object.name}" in Aria Operations for Logs on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} changed log filter "{object.name}" in Aria Operations for Logs on host {event_src.host}
